title: Mosaic
description: An interactive computational-geometry studio: Voronoi by both half-plane intersection and Fortune's sweep-line (with a live beach-line animation), Delaunay, convex hulls, the β-skeleton family (Gabriel↔RNG) and k-nearest graph alongside the full proximity-graph nesting, alpha shapes with an animated α sweep, Ruppert quality meshing, rotating-calipers metrics, Welzl's enclosing circle, largest empty circle, Lloyd relaxation, and shareable point sets — every algorithm built from scratch, with a 49-check test suite.
